evidence_old: 2016 INEI dictionary omits code 6 and incorrectly states range 1-5; 2016 INEI quality report defines A-E for urban and rural separately; in all 36,785 released Sumaria records estrsocial=6 iff estrato is rural (6/7/8), zero mismatches; 2017 INEI dictionary explicitly defines 6=RURAL
evidence_new: INEI'S OWN TESTIMONY ABOUT ITS OWN CODE. 2016 ships no label for estrsocial code 6, but INEI labels that exact code on that exact variable in [2015, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025] as 'Rural' — in its own .dta value labels and/or its published Diccionario de Datos. Same variable, same code, same concept: INEI stopped DOCUMENTING the code, it did not stop USING it.
